nodes.code:
hasPoint = (node: string | SimNode): node is SimNode => (
  typeof node === 'object'
  && Number.isFinite(node.x)
  && Number.isFinite(node.y)
)

nodes.label: ccw()
nodes.code:
ccw = (
  ax: number,
  ay: number,
  bx: number,
  by: number,
  cx: number,
  cy: number
): boolean => (cy - ay) * (bx - ax) > (by - ay) * (cx - ax)
